sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75623" key="o)stofuh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀστο-φῠής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n75623.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of a bony nature</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">substance</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:296" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Batr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">296</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
